recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: The Brave Little Toaster
recommendations.overview: A group of dated appliances, finding themselves stranded in a summer home that their family had just sold, decide to seek out their eight year old 'master'.

recommendations.title: Doraemon: Nobita's Great Adventure in the Antarctic Kachi Kochi
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, Science Fiction, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Doraemon and Nobita discover a mysterious golden ring far beneath the ice in Antarctica, leading them to uncover an ancient, ruined city.

recommendations.title: Pokémon the Movie: Kyurem vs. the Sword of Justice
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Ash and his two friends Iris and Cilan help a Keldeo battle against a powerful Dragon-type Pokémon named Kyurem its his test to become a Sacred Swordsman.

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Doraemon: New Nobita's Great Demon - Peko and the Exploration Party of Five
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Nobita is followed by a stray dog on his way home and decides to help it find its original owner with the help of Doraemon. They find out that the dog is actually a prince in its homeland in Africa.

recommendations.title: The Door
recommendations.overview: A successful artist loses control of his life after his young daughter's death. A chance for a new start appears, but all is not what it seems.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: A Wrinkle in Time
recommendations.overview: After the disappearance of her scientist father, three peculiar beings send Meg, her brother, and her friend to space in order to find him.

recommendations.title: April and the Extraordinary World
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: It's 1941, but France is trapped in the 19th Century, governed by steam and Napoleon V. Avril, a teenage girl, goes in search of her missing scientist parents.
